blocks.description: Program header comments, OPTIONS for compression, LIBNAME definitions for warehouse inventory, staging, and reports libraries
DATA step computing inventory metrics: average daily demand from trailing 90-day demand, days-of-supply, lead time, reorder point with 20% safety buffer, reorder flag, and inventory value
PROC MEANS computing safety stock statistics by product category and warehouse: average/std demand, average days-of-supply, total inventory value and quantity
PROC SQL joining inventory metrics with safety stock stats to classify stock status (CRITICAL_LOW, LOW_STOCK, OVERSTOCK, EXCESS, NORMAL) and estimate stockout dates
PROC SORT ordering inventory movement transactions by warehouse, SKU, and date for running balance calculation
DATA step with RETAIN computing running inventory balance per SKU: applies receipts, issues, and adjustments, flags negative balances as data quality issues using FIRST.sku_id logic
DATA step preparing visualization dataset: derives monthly/weekly time dimensions using INTNX, creates period labels for chart axes
Section header comments and TITLE statements for executive summary report
PROC REPORT generating executive summary filtered to actionable stock statuses with warehouse-level break summaries
